description_long: This is a classic upright arcade machine with a bold red exterior and a large, vertically oriented display screen. The front panel features a control deck with two joysticks and multiple buttons, designed for two-player gaming. The screen is currently displaying a Batman-themed game, and the control panel is decorated with related graphics. The sides of the machine are solid red with a subtle texture, while the back panel features a large, shadowy Batman figure and the word 'BATMAN' in stylized text. The overall structure is rectangular with a slightly angled front for ergonomic access to the controls and screen. The kiosk is constructed primarily from sturdy materials, likely wood or metal, with a glossy finish on the exterior.
description: A red upright arcade machine with a Batman-themed display and control panel, featuring joysticks and buttons for two players. The back panel showcases a large Batman graphic and logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid red textured panel and the protruding control deck.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Batman game on the screen, dual joysticks, and multiple control buttons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the red panel and control deck from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a large Batman silhouette and the 'BATMAN' logo on the back panel.
attribute_signage_type: digital display on front screen showing Batman imagery; printed Batman logo and silhouette on rear panel
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular top with no overhang or decorative elements, matching the main body material
attribute_architectural_style: modern arcade, minimalist with pop culture graphics
